narrative_summary: - Read the `dg scaffold defs` reference doc to understand the correct CLI command syntax for scaffolding assets
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs dagster.asset assets/dwh_asset.py` to scaffold a new asset file at `src/acme_co_dataeng/defs/assets/dwh_asset.py`
- Confirmed the asset was registered correctly by running `uv run dg list defs --json` and grepping for `dwh_asset`
